personas.name: Sleep-Focused Evening User
personas.description: Uses the app mainly before bed and expects quick, low-effort access to calming sleep content.
goals: Start a sleep session quickly with minimal setup
Find narrators and sleep content that work consistently
Use short bedtime sessions when time is limited
pain_points: Too many taps or prompts before playback
Inconsistent sleep content discovery late at night
Session length mismatch for quick bedtime use
context: Primary usage window is late evening
Often opens the app when trying to wind down for sleep
Prefers predictable and repeatable content flow
constraints: Navigation must be simple under low attention
Playback should start quickly and reliably
Search and filtering must remain straightforward

personas.name: Stress-Management Meditation User
personas.description: Uses guided meditations to manage stress and anxiety, usually in short sessions that fit into a busy day.
goals: Find meditation options that match how they feel in the moment
Keep a practical routine even when schedules change
Access concise sessions for short breaks
pain_points: Hard to choose quickly when already stressed
Some sessions feel too generic for specific moments
It can be hard to jump back into a preferred session
context: Used during work breaks and post-stress periods
Mainly uses guided sessions for stress and anxiety
constraints: Session choices should be easy to scan and pick
Favorite and history paths must be reliable
Flow should reduce cognitive load during stress

personas.name: Billing-Conscious Subscriber
personas.description: Watches trial and renewal details closely and expects billing, cancellation, and refunds to be clear and trustworthy.
goals: Understand exact cost and renewal timing before confirming
Cancel or change plans without hidden steps
Review transaction history when a charge looks wrong
pain_points: Low confidence that cancellation actually went through
context: Pays close attention around trial and renewal windows
Escalates quickly when charges seem incorrect
constraints: Billing details must be explicit and easy to verify
History should support quick dispute resolution

personas.name: Audio-Quality and Content-Curation User
personas.description: Picks sessions based on narrator quality, sound balance, and content freshness, and has low tolerance for audio defects.
goals: Find and reuse preferred narrators efficiently
Control voice and background balance during playback
Access sufficient content variety over time
pain_points: Audio artifacts or low narrator clarity
context: Often uses long-form sessions before sleep
Quality expectations are high for immersion
Notices narrator tone and background sound issues quickly
constraints: Narrator catalog paths should be discoverable
Content updates should remain visible and frequent

personas.name: Reliability-First Daily User
personas.description: Uses the app often and prioritizes speed, stability, and predictable behavior over extra features.
goals: Launch and access target content with minimal delay
Use search and playback without regressions
Trust that updates preserve core workflows
pain_points: Slow load times and occasional freezes
Search inconsistency and missing expected results
context: Used in short, frequent sessions throughout the day
Often returns to known content paths
If core flows break, they start looking for alternatives
constraints: Core paths must remain stable after updates
Performance issues should be rare and recoverable
Error states must be clear and actionable
